testcase.name: Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Success Cases › should login with valid credentials and return tokens
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Success Cases › should return user data without password
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Success Cases › should return valid JWT access token format
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Success Cases › should return valid refresh token format
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Validation Errors › should return 400 when email is missing
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Validation Errors › should return 400 when password is missing
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Validation Errors › should return 400 when body is empty
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Authentication Errors › should return error for non-existent user
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Authentication Errors › should return error for wrong password
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Authentication Errors › should return error for case-sensitive password
Login API @auth @smoke › POST /api/auth/login - Email Verification › should handle unverified email appropriately
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/health › should return healthy status with all system metrics
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/health › should return database connection status
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/health › should return system memory information
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/health › should return Node.js version
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/health › should respond within acceptable time limit
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/v1 › should return API version information
Health Check API @health @smoke › GET /api/v1 › should have correct content-type header
